name: Lemon.io
description: Lemon.io — Freelance marketplace for startups to hire pre-vetted remote developers with quick matching.

seo.title: Lemon.io — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Lemon.io: Lemon.io — Freelance marketplace for startups to hire pre-vetted remote developers with quick matching.

when_to_use: Quickly hiring a vetted startup developer for a new feature
Freelance dev matching for an early-stage product sprint
Staff augmentation for a Series A team scaling engineering
Finding a niche specialist without posting to generic job boards
On-demand development capacity for a bootstrapped founder

pros: Fast matching focused on startup fit
Pre-vetted remote devs with reasonable rates
cons: Smaller pool than Toptal or Upwork
review.verdict: A pragmatic middle ground between Upworks chaos and Toptals premium pricing.
review.best_for: Early-stage startups hiring remote engineers quickly with startup-budget rates.
review.not_for: Enterprises needing scale, deep compliance, or non-engineering specialists.
